commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -A -o wide' 2>&1 | grep -E 'efa-validation|nvidia-device'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get nodes -l workload-type=gpu -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,GPU-ALLOCATABLE:.status.allocatable.nvidia\.com/gpu,GPU-CAPACITY:.status.capacity.nvidia\.com/gpu,READY:.status.conditions[-1].type'
